name: John Kasich
subject: 15% Off Sale - 48 Hours - Starting NOW!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[

](www.JohnKasich.com)
Peter, last week I announced that I'm running to be the next President of the United States.

Recent news reports state that of all the GOP candidates, [Hillary Clinton is the most worried about my candidacy](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29375917:28180310338:m:1:958431888:0EE2F185672875D407BE5933E438A8C4:r).

**For the next 48 hours, we're having a 15% off sale on our online store!**

**Simply use the promo code:** KASICH2016

**Visit:** [Store.JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29375918:28180310338:m:1:958431888:0EE2F185672875D407BE5933E438A8C4:r) to get started!

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29375918:28180310338:m:1:958431888:0EE2F185672875D407BE5933E438A8C4:r)

Thank you for all that you're doing to help. Together, we can win!

-John

**John Kasich**
Governor of Ohio
[JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29375919:28180310338:m:1:958431888:0EE2F185672875D407BE5933E438A8C4:r)

Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Just three more days
body:
Friend, I know I have asked for your help before, but your help today is critical. | |

---
---
|
Friend,

There are just three days left in July, and I need your immediate financial support to ensure we meet our July fundraising goals.

**[Can I count on you to chip in $15 or more right now to my campaign?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29389723:28187290424:m:1:877327319:D408E115BCA2A7ECDC8D378858E285A7:r)**

It's critical that we stay on track with our fundraising efforts in July - traditionally one of the most difficult months to raise money for campaigns.

[**Can I count on you right now, Friend? Will you please chip in $15, $25, $50 or more to help guarantee we hit our critical monthly goal?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29389723:28187290424:m:1:877327319:D408E115BCA2A7ECDC8D378858E285A7:r)

| [** Donate $5 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29389724:28187290424:m:1:877327319:D408E115BCA2A7ECDC8D378858E285A7:r) | [** Donate $15 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29389725:28187290424:m:1:877327319:D408E115BCA2A7ECDC8D378858E285A7:r)
---|---
[** Donate $25 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29389726:28187290424:m:1:877327319:D408E115BCA2A7ECDC8D378858E285A7:r) | [** Donate $50 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29389727:28187290424:m:1:877327319:D408E115BCA2A7ECDC8D378858E285A7:r)
[** Donate $75 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29389728:28187290424:m:1:877327319:D408E115BCA2A7ECDC8D378858E285A7:r) | [** Donate $100 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29389729:28187290424:m:1:877327319:D408E115BCA2A7ECDC8D378858E285A7:r)
[** Donate $250 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29389730:28187290424:m:1:877327319:D408E115BCA2A7ECDC8D378858E285A7:r) | [** Donate $500 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29389731:28187290424:m:1:877327319:D408E115BCA2A7ECDC8D378858E285A7:r)

While many people are winding down on vacation breaks this summer, our campaign is gearing up for an aggressive schedule of town hall meetings, house parties, and Republican Party events. We're not slowing down, so that's why it is critical we keep our foot on the fundraising pedal.

[**Please follow this link to give as generously as you can to our campaign.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29389723:28187290424:m:1:877327319:D408E115BCA2A7ECDC8D378858E285A7:r)

Thank you for your support.

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

P.S. In order to ensure we hit our critical End of Month deadline, I need your urgent financial support in the next three days. [**Will you please chip in as much as you can afford by following this link?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29389723:28187290424:m:1:877327319:D408E115BCA2A7ECDC8D378858E285A7:r) Thank you.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29389723:28187290424:m:1:877327319:D408E115BCA2A7ECDC8D378858E285A7:r)

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

---

name: Doug Stafford
subject: New video re: Planned Parenthood
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Thanks to your pressure all weekend, the Senate will vote on Rand Paul's bill to strip Planned Parenthood of every last dime of taxpayer funding before the August recess.

Now that Senator Paul has secured a vote, you and I are entering phase two of this fight -- turning up the pressure on fence-riding Senators to pass Rand Paul's bill.

I've put together a **[brief video with some highlights of Senator Paul's fight](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29393661:28189679365:m:1:879035888:297A8188F331F7368CB9A3047AF32FC1:r)** over the weekend to secure a vote on his bill. **[Please take a moment to check it out](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29393661:28189679365:m:1:879035888:297A8188F331F7368CB9A3047AF32FC1:r)**.

That's why it's critical you call your Senators at **(202) 224-3121** and insist they "Stand with Rand" and vote for his bill to defund Planned Parenthood.

And please let Senator Paul know you're in his corner by **[adding your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor to his bill](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29393661:28189679365:m:1:879035888:297A8188F331F7368CB9A3047AF32FC1:r)**.

Fellow Conservative, the Senate is scheduled to recess in just days.

And Senator Paul is counting on you to help pass his bill and strip Planned Parenthood of every last dime of taxpayer funding.

Some members of our Republican Party run scared from any mention of Planned Parenthood.

But some Democrats are already worrying about their re-elections if they vote to keep your tax dollars flowing to an organization that kills unborn babies, dismembers them and sells off their body parts for profit.

This vote could come down to the wire.

That's why Senator Paul needs your help to turn up the pressure more than ever.

After the release of yesterday's disgusting video showing a Planned Parenthood Vice President discussing how to maximize profits from selling the aborted baby body parts, saying she thinks a "per-item thing works a little better, just because we can see how much we can get out of it," this issue is red hot in the public arena.

The American people remain outraged -- and they're demanding Congress take action to defund Planned Parenthood.

Senator Paul is leading this fight.

And he really needs your help to mobilize as many Americans as possible to turn up the heat on their Senators to vote for his bill.

**[So please, Fellow Conservative, chip in a contribution of $20.16 to help Rand round up support for his bill](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29393661:28189679365:m:1:879035888:297A8188F331F7368CB9A3047AF32FC1:r)**.

But remember, time is short. So please take immediate action.

In Liberty,

Doug Stafford
Chief Strategist

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29393661:28189679365:m:1:879035888:297A8188F331F7368CB9A3047AF32FC1:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29393662:28189679365:m:1:879035888:297A8188F331F7368CB9A3047AF32FC1:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29393663:28189679365:m:1:879035888:297A8188F331F7368CB9A3047AF32FC1:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29393664:28189679365:m:1:879035888:297A8188F331F7368CB9A3047AF32FC1:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.

name: Elise Dietsch
subject: 30 for 30
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Peter, I know you've heard from both Cam, our finance director, and Hayden, our data director, within the last week regarding your Founding Digital Member status. Since there are only hours left before the July 30th deadline, I wanted to personally follow up to ensure you don't miss this limited-time opportunity.

Our Founding Digital Members are our earliest supporters who have made a **financial commitment within the first 30 days** of Governor Christie's presidential campaign. The deadline to become a Founding Digital Member **ends tomorrow at midnight** and, with time running out, we urge you to **[sign up now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43166384:18362344734:m:1:1516426255:5A08976D525136C3952FA2FCC4A35685:r)**.
**Email ID: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Founding Digital Member Status: Not Active**
**Become a Member Below:**
**[Suggested Donation Amount: $30>>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43166385:18362344734:m:1:1516426255:5A08976D525136C3952FA2FCC4A35685:r)**
****
****
As a reminder, this special group receives member-only benefits, including:
> * Team conference calls
> * Email updates from campaign leadership
> * **SPECIAL:** if you donate before the deadline, you will also receive an official Chris Christie presidential campaign bumper sticker.
>

Don't pass up this opportunity and **[become a Founding Digital Member](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43166384:18362344734:m:1:1516426255:5A08976D525136C3952FA2FCC4A35685:r)** before this offer ends tomorrow at midnight!
Thank you,

Elise Dietsch
Deputy Finance Director
Chris Christie 2016
PS: Governor Christie will personally review the Founding Digital Member roster so don't miss your chance to make the list! **[Click here now to chip in $30 or more for your Founding Digital Member status!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43166384:18362344734:m:1:1516426255:5A08976D525136C3952FA2FCC4A35685:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43166384:18362344734:m:1:1516426255:5A08976D525136C3952FA2FCC4A35685:r)

name: George P. Bush
subject: Hillary is pulling away
body:
Friend,

I know my brother reached out, but I wanted to follow up.

Did he tell you about our crucial fundraising deadline in just 2 days? We need to raise $150,000 by midnight and we are currently $64,418 short. [**That 's why I need you to give $100, $50, $25 or even $5 now.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/clprvgmzqlcfhshtfgnrqfksmmfkzsvzrgjgczsthglj_gtlrrnmw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Every minute counts as we're rapidly approaching our final deadline before the first debate in Cleveland on August 6. **Every minute you don 't chip in, is a minute Hillary pulls ahead.**

[**That 's why I'm asking you to turn up the heat with the maximum gift you can afford of $100, $50, $25 or even $5 right now.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/vgvbdkyzmghnrcrfnktbmnqcyynqzcdzbkjkhzcfrkgm_gtlrrnmw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Since Dad has announced, everyone is watching... and they're waiting for us to falter. I've got news for them, failure is not an option. Let's show them the fight they're in for.

[**Show them they 've picked the wrong fight with the most generous gift you can of $100, $50, $25 or even $5.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/fndztbylrnjwqpqdwbfzrwcpyywclptlzbgbjlpdqbny_gtlrrnmw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Can Dad, Jeb Jr. and I count on you? Help us finish strong: [**Jeb2016.com/Donate**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/nfkhgtkmjpdnwbwqntzhjncbkkncmbgmhtrtdmbqwtrw_gtlrrnmw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Thank you for your continued support.

George P. Bush

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/pjdtwyvkdlmbfgfhbystdbrgvvbrkgwktycymkghfych_gtlrrnmw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=1452&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: Rick Santorum for President
subject: I’m Declaring War on Planned Parenthood
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
body:
| [ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=war_on_pp&n=1)
---
Friend --
It’s time to declare war on Planned Parenthood and end their taxpayer funding forever. The videos of Planned Parenthood selling the body parts of innocent little children is barbaric and intolerable. Barack Obama looking the other way makes him an accomplice. And Republicans refusing to immediately end these atrocities by cutting off funding is every bit as disappointing. You know my commitment to this issue is long standing and unwavering. I wrote and passed the bill that criminalized the technique that Planned Parenthood is using to harvest these body parts.

You know that as President, I can be trusted to end funding for this despicable organization. **Are you going to stand with me?** By making an immediate contribution to my campaign, it will send a loud message to Planned Parenthood that we have joined forces to shut down their federal funding. [**DONATE TODAY**](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/defund_planned_parenthood?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=war_on_pp&n=2) Being pro-life is about more than checking a box. It’s about standing up and fighting everyday for those who can’t protect themselves. Please join me in this critical fight. God Bless,
Rick Santorum for President
[http://www.ricksantorum.com/](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=war_on_pp&n=3)

[ ](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/defund_planned_parenthood?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=war_on_pp&n=4)

Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=war_on_pp&n=5).
You can also keep up with Rick Santorum for President on [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=war_on_pp&n=6) or [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=war_on_pp&n=7).

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: hey- filling you in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

Pundits and media outlets all across the country are watching our race. Roll Call even said ours is a top race to watch for 2016. That means outside groups are also eyeing our race, and they're going to pour tons of cash into Maryland to drown out the voices of voters like you.

If we're going to overcome the tidal wave of outside spending, we need every supporter to pitch in now to build a people-powered campaign that will carry us through to victory in 2016.

Here's the thing: Friday marks our end-of-month deadline, and without your help we won't hit an incredibly important goal.

**[We need 950 grassroots contributions by midnight Friday. Can I count on you to be one of them?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eb3/70cdc2ba/47939c0f/3952a1c/3202149919/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em072915_1nd&amount=5.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+We+need+950+grassroots+contributions+by+&utm_campaign=em072715&source=em072715") **

Taking back the Senate starts in Maryland, and that makes Friday's deadline even more important. We have to show our strength, so I need you to act now.

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $3 instantly.>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eb3/70cdc2ba/47939c0f/3952ace/3202149919/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em072915_1nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=7+-+Donate+3+instantly+gtgt&utm_campaign=em072715&source=em072715")** **[Donate $10 instantly.>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eb3/70cdc2ba/47939c0f/3952ac5/3202149919/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em072915_1nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=8+-+Donate+10+instantly+gtgt&utm_campaign=em072715&source=em072715")** **[Donate $25 instantly.>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eb3/70cdc2ba/47939c0f/3952ad9/3202149919/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em072915_1nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=9+-+Donate+25+instantly+gtgt&utm_campaign=em072715&source=em072715")** **[Or, donate another amount.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eb3/70cdc2ba/47939c0f/3952aef/3202149919/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em072915_1nd&amount=5.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=10+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em072715&source=em072715")** You know I've always led the fight to keep secret money out of our elections. And I can't stand idly by while voters' voices are silenced by special interests and shadowy billionaires.

That's why it's so important for us to build a campaign on the strength of grassroots supporters like you. I can -- and I will -- work every day to effectively advance our values and priorities in the U.S. Senate, but only if we get there together. [**Will you be one of the 950 grassroots donors we need before our midnight Friday deadline? Click here to give right now.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eb3/70cdc2ba/47939c0f/3952af2/3202149919/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em072915_1nd&amount=5.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=12+-+Will+you+be+one+of+the+950+grassroots+do&utm_campaign=em072715&source=em072715")

Thanks for your incredible support,

Chris

| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

name: Mike Huckabee - Personal
subject: What do you think about my Iran comment?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Huckabee for President
body:
| Friend, As you know, my comments referencing Iran’s threats to invoke a holocaust against Israel have caused Hillary Clinton and President Obama to attack me directly. Do you believe I went too far with my comments? Go to my website and vote here: [http://www.mikehuckabee.com/iranpoll](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjYyNDYtNzNhZGY0NmEtYmMwZC00ZjdjLWFlNTYtNzVkYWI0OTRhNmRhDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA1MGI3NWM2DQpodHRwOi8vd3d3Lm1pa2VodWNrYWJlZS5jb20vaXJhbnBvbGw%2fcz1XVkRBDQp0cnVlDQpkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbQ%3d%3d) Frankly, your opinion matters more to me than what anyone in the media says. So please let me know with a simple click where you stand. Thanks, Mike Huckabee Sent from my iPad
---

Paid for by Huckabee for President
---

name: Terry Sullivan, MarcoRubio.com
subject: On the trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43174061:18370804500:m:1:1349778030:BFCDAAE41FA0DEFE2A1C6124747EEDAB:r)
---
Peter-- Marco was on the campaign trail in South Carolina this week, where he officially filed for the Republican primary -- the first candidate to do so. Here's a look at life on the trail for Marco this week. Terry Sullivan
Campaign Manager
Marco Rubio for President
* * *
**Monday - 2:00 pm
South Carolina GOP Headquarters
Columbia, SC** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43174062:18370804500:m:1:1349778030:BFCDAAE41FA0DEFE2A1C6124747EEDAB:r) _Marco officially files for the South Carolina Primary_ After signing the paperwork, our South Carolina Campaign Co-Chair Rep. Collins Neal, notarizes the document, making it official. Marco chats with Chairman Matt Moore. **Monday - 5:30 pm
Brewery 85
Greenville, SC** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43174062:18370804500:m:1:1349778030:BFCDAAE41FA0DEFE2A1C6124747EEDAB:r) _Marco speaks to members of the Upstate Chamber of Commerce in the warehouse of Brewery 85_ [Click here to watch local news coverage of Marco's visit to the brewery. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43174062:18370804500:m:1:1349778030:BFCDAAE41FA0DEFE2A1C6124747EEDAB:r) **Monday - 7:30 p.m.
Swamp Rabbit Crossfit
Greenville, SC** **[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43174062:18370804500:m:1:1349778030:BFCDAAE41FA0DEFE2A1C6124747EEDAB:r)**_Marco speaks to a campaign rally_ _ _ **Tuesday - 10 a.m.
Furman University
Greenville, SC** **[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43174062:18370804500:m:1:1349778030:BFCDAAE41FA0DEFE2A1C6124747EEDAB:r)**_Marco participates in a forum hosted by Americans for Peace Prosperity and Security_ Thanks for your continued support in making these successful campaign trips happen. For the very latest news, photos, and information from the campaign trail, follow Marco on [Twitter](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43174063:18370804500:m:1:1349778030:BFCDAAE41FA0DEFE2A1C6124747EEDAB:r) and [Facebook](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43174064:18370804500:m:1:1349778030:BFCDAAE41FA0DEFE2A1C6124747EEDAB:r).
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43174065:18370804500:m:1:1349778030:BFCDAAE41FA0DEFE2A1C6124747EEDAB:r)
| Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
---|---|---

You were added to the system March 30, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://email.vervemail.com/p/i6reDHWpNx). [Update your preferences](http://email.vervemail.com/p/o6reDHWpNx)

name: Sheila O'Connell, Chris Van Hollen for US Senate
subject: FW:hey - filling you in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

Like Chris said: all eyes are on us right now. If Democrats fail to take back the Senate, all the pundits will say it started right here in Maryland.

With ours being called the "race to watch," we know shadowy outside groups are ready to pounce. We can fight back, but only if we start today to build our own grassroots movement to counter these deep-pocketed outside special interests.

I'll just be honest: we need you to step up. If you pitch in, I promise we'll put Chris in the Senate. Are you with us?

**Use this link to give $5 now, and help us reach 950 grassroots donations:[http://action.vanhollen.org/july](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eb1/70cdc2ba/47922bbe/39521f0/655155736/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em072915_2nd&amount=5.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+httpactionvanhollenorgjuly&utm_campaign=em072915_2&source=em072915_2")**

Chris is lucky to have supporters like you.

Thank you.

Sheila O'Connell
Campaign Manager
Van Hollen for Senate

\----Original Message----

Friend -

Pundits and media outlets all across the country are watching our race. Roll Call even said ours is a top race to watch for 2016. That means outside groups are also eyeing our race, and they're going to pour tons of cash into Maryland to drown out the voices of voters like you.

If we're going to overcome the tidal wave of outside spending, we need every supporter to pitch in now to build a people-powered campaign that will carry us through to victory in 2016.

Here's the thing: Friday marks our end-of-month deadline, and without your help we won't hit an incredibly important goal.

**[We need 950 grassroots contributions by midnight Friday. Can I count on you to be one of them?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eb1/70cdc2ba/47922bbe/395219a/655155736/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em072915_2nd&amount=5.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+We+need+950+grassroots+contributions+by+&utm_campaign=em072915_2&source=em072915_2") **

Taking back the Senate starts in Maryland, and that makes Friday's deadline even more important. We have to show our strength, so I need you to act now.

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $3 instantly.>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eb1/70cdc2ba/47922bbe/3952043/655155736/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em072915_2nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=9+-+Donate+3+instantly+gtgt&utm_campaign=em072915_2&source=em072915_2")** **[Donate $10 instantly.>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eb1/70cdc2ba/47922bbe/3952057/655155736/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em072915_2nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=10+-+Donate+10+instantly+gtgt&utm_campaign=em072915_2&source=em072915_2")** **[Donate $25 instantly.>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eb1/70cdc2ba/47922bbe/395206a/655155736/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em072915_2nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=11+-+Donate+25+instantly+gtgt&utm_campaign=em072915_2&source=em072915_2")** **[Or, donate another amount.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eb1/70cdc2ba/47922bbe/395207c/655155736/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em072915_2nd&amount=5.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=12+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em072915_2&source=em072915_2")** You know I've always led the fight to keep secret money out of our elections. And I can't stand idly by while voters' voices are silenced by special interests and shadowy billionaires.

That's why it's so important for us to build a campaign on the strength of grassroots supporters like you. I can -- and I will -- work every day to effectively advance our values and priorities in the U.S. Senate, but only if we get there together. [**Will you be one of the 950 grassroots donors we need before our midnight Friday deadline? Click here to give right now.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eb1/70cdc2ba/47922bbe/3952009/655155736/VEsHAQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em072915_2nd&amount=5.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=14+-+Will+you+be+one+of+the+950+grassroots+do&utm_campaign=em072915_2&source=em072915_2")

Thanks for your incredible support,

Chris

| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Protect and Expand Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| I'm the candidate who will protect Social Security for Floridians.Friend -- I wanted to make sure you heard the news. I'm leading a measure in Congress to protect and expand Social Security. Florida's seniors have always been my priority and always will be. That's why I'm proud to sign onto this resolution. Two-thirds of retirees depend on Social Security for the majority of their income, one in three for 90 percent or more. Congress must do everything we can to protect and expand Social Security. And I'm proud to be a leader on this issue. **I'm running to protect Social Security for Floridians. Will you stand with me and make a donation right now before the July 31 deadline?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ **[Chip in $5 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-july2015primary?express_lane=true&refcode=ema_2015-07-29_b1_pm_ldnd&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[Chip in $35 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-july2015primary?express_lane=true&refcode=ema_2015-07-29_b1_pm_ldnd&amount=250&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-july2015primary?refcode=ema_2015-07-29_b1_pm_ldnd&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** This race isn't about debates or attacks. clean_body: | I'm the candidate who will protect Social Security for Floridians.Friend -- I wanted to make sure you heard the news. I'm leading a measure in Congress to protect and expand Social Security. Florida's seniors have always been my priority and always will be. That's why I'm proud to sign onto this resolution. Two-thirds of retirees depend on Social Security for the majority of their income, one in three for 90 percent or more. Congress must do everything we can to protect and expand Social Security. And I'm proud to be a leader on this issue. I'm running to protect Social Security for Floridians. Will you stand with me and make a donation right now before the July 31 deadline? If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. "=" "=" "=" "=" "=" "=" This race isn't about debates or attacks. This race is about the lives of everyday Floridians. Thank you for your continued support. Thanks, Patrick Murphy | "" | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | ""

name: Michelle Kwan
subject: Your limited-edition supporter card is available now:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Get yours! | Friend --

I'm so proud to be a member of Team Hillary, which is why I'm excited about this: For a limited time only, the campaign is sending supporter cards to people like us who are with Hillary from the start.

**[Chip in $1 or more right now to get your limited-edition supporter card in the mail.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjMxNTY0NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyOTA4NjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

A lot of people were surprised that I decided to take a full-time job working for this campaign. Most Americans know me as an Olympic figure skater; they don't realize in my post-skating life, I worked with Hillary at the State Department to empower women and girls around the world. I came to admire Hillary deeply for her strength, leadership, intelligence, and diplomacy.

When Hillary announced she was running for president, I knew I had to be a part of this. Every morning when I walk into campaign headquarters, I feel so grateful to have the chance to serve my country by helping a woman like Hillary become president.

I hope you’ll have that same feeling every time you look at your supporter card! You can hold it in your hand, see your name printed on it, and know that you are a vital part of Team Hillary -- you are one of the supporters who had Hillary's back from the beginning to help her get all the way to the White House.

**Chip in $1 or more right now to get your limited-edition supporter card in the mail:

[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/supporter-card/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjMxNTY0NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyOTA4NjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks!

Michelle

Michelle Kwan
Surrogate Outreach Coordinator
Hillary for America

P.S. Have you seen the design for the cards? They look so good! **[Get yours now!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjMxNTY0NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyOTA4NjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**
| | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjMxNTY0NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyOTA4NjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjMxNTY0NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyOTA4NjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjMxNTY0NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyOTA4NjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjMxNTY0NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyOTA4NjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjMxNTY0NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyOTA4NjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

******Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjMxNTY0NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyOTA4NjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjMxNTY0NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyOTA4NjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjMxNTY0NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyOTA4NjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMxNTY0NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyOTA4NjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjMxNTY0NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyOTA4NjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjMxNTY0NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyOTA4NjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjMxNTY0NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyOTA4NjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
